Use CasesLaw IF6Cell Energy Optimisation Validation
Law I: Capacity ScarcityF6: Cost Efficiency Validationsolo

Cell Energy Optimisation Validation

Trigger

Energy management system proposes cell sleeping for 47 low-traffic cells. Active probe confirms coverage impact before execution.

Tools Required

Emblasoft EvolverEmblasoft

Response at Each Autonomy Level

L1

Engineer reviews probe coverage data before approving cell sleep schedule.

L2

Cell sleeping applied automatically within pre-validated coverage boundaries.

L3

Dynamic cell sleeping adjusted in real time based on continuous probe feedback.

L4

Autonomous energy optimisation continuously validated against delivered coverage. No human approval required.

Economic Outcome

Energy savings achieved without coverage degradation or subscriber impact.

Average energy cost per active cell site: €15K–€25K/year. 10% reduction across 500 sites = €750K–€1.25M annual saving. Zero churn cost if coverage impact is validated before execution.

Combination Upgrade

None required for validation. Emblasoft Evolver functional testing mode can provide periodic deep scenario validation in high-risk areas.

Related Use Cases

Law ILaw VIF1solo

Silent Cell Degradation Detection

Active probe throughput drops 20% below 7-day baseline. No OSS alarm. No PM counter breach.

L1L2L3L4
Churn prevented in affected cell area before subscriber notices degradation.
